evals.name: single-version-anchor-url
evals.prompt: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#21128 클로드코드 2.1.128 변경사항 보고 dotfiles에 추가할거 있나 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: Tiered (Tier 1/2/3) recommendation list for version 2.1.128 only, with file_path:line_number citations to ~/.dotfiles/.claude/settings.json or related files. Output in Korean. Bug fixes filtered out. Ends with the standard '어느 항목을 적용할까요?' prompt.

evals.name: version-range-with-existing-context
evals.prompt: claude code 2.1.120부터 2.1.126까지 변경사항 검토하고 추가할거 있나 알려줘
evals.expected_output: Tiered output covering all 7 versions in the inclusive range. Categorizes hooks/MCP/env vars/permissions touchpoints. Cites paths in ~/.dotfiles/. Filters bug fixes. Top-1 recommendation has explicit reasoning.

evals.name: last-n-default-no-args
evals.prompt: 최근 클로드코드 릴리스에서 추가할거 있나 봐줘
evals.expected_output: Defaults to last 5 versions (per skill spec). Same tiered output structure. Asks once if range was unclear, not multiple times.

evals.name: negative-trigger-gemini-changelog
evals.prompt: Gemini CLI changelog 보고 settings 추가할거 있나
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger (description includes 'Do NOT use for non-Claude-Code changelogs'). If invoked anyway, refuses or redirects to a different approach.
